WATCHER-DEFEND_WATCHER.title: Defend
WATCHER-STRIKE_WATCHER.title: Strike
WATCHER-VIGILANCE.title: Vigilance
WATCHER-ERUPTION.title: Eruption
WATCHER-BOWLING_BASH.title: Bowling Bash
WATCHER-BOWLING_BASH.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage for each enemy in combat.
WATCHER-CONSECRATE.title: Consecrate
WATCHER-CRESCENDO.title: Crescendo
WATCHER-CRUSH_JOINTS.title: Crush Joints
WATCHER-CRUSH_JOINTS.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If the last card played this combat was a [gold]Skill[/gold], apply {VulnerablePower:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
WATCHER-CUT_THROUGH_FATE.title: Cut Through Fate
WATCHER-EMPTY_FIST.title: Empty Fist
WATCHER-INSIGHT.title: Insight
WATCHER-FLURRY_OF_BLOWS.title: Flurry of Blows
WATCHER-FLURRY_OF_BLOWS.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Whenever you change Stances, return this from the discard pile to your hand.
WATCHER-FLYING_SLEEVES.title: Flying Sleeves
WATCHER-FOLLOW_UP.title: Follow-Up
WATCHER-FOLLOW_UP.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If the last card played was an Attack, gain [blue]1[/blue] {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
WATCHER-JUST_LUCKY.title: Just Lucky
WATCHER-REACH_HEAVEN.title: Reach Heaven
WATCHER-REACH_HEAVEN.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Shuffle a [gold]Through Violence[/gold] into your draw pile.
WATCHER-THROUGH_VIOLENCE.title: Through Violence
WATCHER-SASH_WHIP.title: Sash Whip
WATCHER-SASH_WHIP.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If the last card played
this combat was an
Attack, apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold].
WATCHER-THIRD_EYE.title: Third Eye
WATCHER-TRANQUILITY.title: Tranquility
WATCHER-WINDMILL_STRIKE.title: Windmill Strike
WATCHER-WINDMILL_STRIKE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
When this card is [gold]Retained[/gold],
increase its damage by {RetainIncrease:diff()}.
WATCHER-EMPTY_BODY.title: Empty Body
WATCHER-EMPTY_MIND.title: Empty Mind
WATCHER-HALT.title: Halt
WATCHER-HALT.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
If you are in [gold]Wrath[/gold],
gain {WrathBlock:diff()} additional
[gold]Block[/gold].
WATCHER-PRESSURE_POINTS.title: Pressure Points
WATCHER-PRESSURE_POINTS.description:
Apply {MarkPower:diff()} [gold]Mark[/gold].
ALL enemies lose HP
equal to their [gold]Mark[/gold].
WATCHER-PROSTRATE.title: Prostrate
WATCHER-PROTECT.title: Protect
WATCHER-INNER_PEACE.title: Inner Peace
WATCHER-INNER_PEACE.description: If you are in [gold]Calm[/gold], draw {Cards:diff()} cards. Otherwise, enter [gold]Calm[/gold].
WATCHER-RUSHDOWN.title: Rushdown
WATCHER-CARVE_REALITY.title: Carve Reality
WATCHER-CARVE_REALITY.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Add a [gold]Smite[/gold] into your hand.
WATCHER-CONCLUDE.title: Conclude
WATCHER-CONCLUDE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
End your turn.
WATCHER-DECEIVE_REALITY.title: Deceive Reality
WATCHER-DECEIVE_REALITY.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Add a [gold]Safety[/gold] into your hand.
WATCHER-FEAR_NO_EVIL.title: Fear No Evil
WATCHER-FEAR_NO_EVIL.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If the enemy intends to attack, enter [gold]Calm[/gold].
WATCHER-FOREIGN_INFLUENCE.title: Foreign Influence
WATCHER-FOREIGN_INFLUENCE.description:
Choose 1 of 3 Attacks of any color to add to your hand.{IfUpgraded:show:
It costs 0 this turn.|}
WATCHER-JUDGMENT.title: Judgment
WATCHER-JUDGMENT.description: If the enemy has {DamageThreshold:diff()} HP or less, set their HP to 0.
WATCHER-RAGNAROK.title: Ragnarok
WATCHER-RAGNAROK.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy {Repeat:diff()} times.
WATCHER-SIGNATURE_MOVE.title: Signature Move
WATCHER-SIGNATURE_MOVE.description:
Can only be played if this is the only Attack in your hand.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
WATCHER-SIMMERING_FURY.title: Simmering Fury
WATCHER-SIMMERING_FURY.description: At the start of your next turn, enter [gold]Wrath[/gold] and draw {DrawCardsNextTurnPower:diff()} cards.
WATCHER-TANTRUM.title: Tantrum
WATCHER-TANTRUM.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Repeat:diff()} times.
Enter [gold]Wrath[/gold].
Shuffle this card into your draw pile.
WATCHER-WAVE_OF_THE_HAND.title: Wave of the Hand
WATCHER-WAVE_OF_THE_HAND.description: Whenever you gain [gold]Block[/gold] this turn, apply {WaveOfTheHandPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] to ALL enemies.
WATCHER-WEAVE.title: Weave
WATCHER-WEAVE.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Whenever you [gold]Scry[/gold], return this from the discard pile to your Hand.
WATCHER-WHEEL_KICK.title: Wheel Kick
WATCHER-BATTLE_HYMN.title: Battle Hymn
WATCHER-BATTLE_HYMN.description: At the start of each turn, add a [gold]Smite[/gold] into your hand.
WATCHER-SMITE.title: Smite
WATCHER-SAFETY.title: Safety
WATCHER-COLLECT.title: Collect
WATCHER-COLLECT.description:
Put a [gold]Miracle+[/gold] into
 your hand at the start
of your next {IfUpgraded:show:X+1|X} turns.
WATCHER-MIRACLE.title: Miracle
WATCHER-EVALUATE.title: Evaluate
WATCHER-EVALUATE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Shuffle an [gold]Insight[/gold] into your draw pile.
WATCHER-FASTING.title: Fasting
WATCHER-FASTING.description:
Gain {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].
Gain {DexterityPower:diff()} [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
Gain 1 less {Energy:energyIcons()} at the start of each turn.
WATCHER-INDIGNATION.title: Indignation
WATCHER-INDIGNATION.description: If you are in [gold]Wrath[/gold], apply {VulnerablePower:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] to ALL enemies. Otherwise, enter [gold]Wrath[/gold].
WATCHER-LIKE_WATER.title: Like Water
WATCHER-LIKE_WATER.description: At the end of your turn, if you are in [gold]Calm[/gold], gain {LikeWaterPower:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
WATCHER-MEDITATE.title: Meditate
WATCHER-MEDITATE.description:
Put {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards} from your discard pile into your hand and [gold]Retain[/gold] {Cards:plural:it|them}.
Enter [gold]Calm[/gold].
End your turn.
WATCHER-MENTAL_FORTRESS.title: Mental Fortress
WATCHER-NIRVANA.title: Nirvana
WATCHER-PERSEVERANCE.title: Perseverance
WATCHER-PERSEVERANCE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Whenever this card is [gold]Retained[/gold], increase its [gold]Block[/gold] by {Increase:diff()}.
WATCHER-PRAY.title: Pray
WATCHER-PRAY.description:
Gain {MantraPower:diff()} [gold]Mantra[/gold].
Shuffle an [gold]Insight[/gold] into your draw pile.
WATCHER-SANCTITY.title: Sanctity
WATCHER-SANCTITY.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
If the last card played this combat was a Skill, draw 2 cards.
WATCHER-STUDY.title: Study
WATCHER-STUDY.description: At the end of your turn, shuffle an [gold]Insight[/gold] into your draw pile.
WATCHER-SWIVEL.title: Swivel
WATCHER-SWIVEL.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
The next Attack you play costs 0.
WATCHER-TALK_TO_THE_HAND.title: Talk to the Hand
WATCHER-TALK_TO_THE_HAND.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Whenever you attack this enemy, gain {BlockReturnPower:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
WATCHER-WALLOP.title: Wallop
WATCHER-WALLOP.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to unblocked damage dealt.
WATCHER-WORSHIP.title: Worship
WATCHER-DEVOTION.title: Devotion
WATCHER-DEVOTION.description: At the start of your turn, gain {DevotionPower:diff()} [gold]Mantra[/gold].
WATCHER-FORESIGHT.title: Foresight
WATCHER-FORESIGHT.description: At the start of your turn, [gold]Scry[/gold] {ForesightPower:diff()}.
WATCHER-BRILLIANCE.title: Brilliance
WATCHER-BRILLIANCE.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.
Deals additional damage equal to [gold]Mantra[/gold] gained this combat.
WATCHER-LESSON_LEARNED.title: Lesson Learned
WATCHER-LESSON_LEARNED.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If [gold]Fatal[/gold], [gold]Upgrade[/gold] a random card in your deck.
WATCHER-SANDS_OF_TIME.title: Sands of Time
WATCHER-SANDS_OF_TIME.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
When [gold]Retained[/gold], lower its cost by 1 this combat.
WATCHER-SCRAWL_WATCHER.title: Scrawl
WATCHER-SCRAWL_WATCHER.description: Draw cards until your hand is full.
WATCHER-VAULT.title: Vault
WATCHER-VAULT.description:
Take an extra turn after this one.
End your turn.
WATCHER-BLASPHEMY.title: Blasphemy
WATCHER-CONJURE_BLADE.title: Conjure Blade
WATCHER-CONJURE_BLADE.description: Shuffle an [gold]Expunger[/gold] {IfUpgraded:show:with X+1 |}into your draw pile.
WATCHER-EXPUNGER.title: Expunger
WATCHER-DEUS_EX_MACHINA.title: Deus Ex Machina
WATCHER-DEUS_EX_MACHINA.description: When you draw this card, add {Cards:diff()} [gold]Miracles[/gold] to your hand and [gold]Exhaust[/gold].
WATCHER-ESTABLISHMENT.title: Establishment
WATCHER-ESTABLISHMENT.description: Whenever a card is [gold]Retained[/gold], reduce its cost by 1 this combat.
WATCHER-OMNISCIENCE.title: Omniscience
WATCHER-OMNISCIENCE.description: Choose a card in your draw pile. Play the chosen card twice and [gold]Exhaust[/gold] it.
WATCHER-OMNISCIENCE.selectionScreenPromp: Select a card to play twice and [gold]Exhaust[/gold].
WATCHER-SPIRIT_SHIELD.title: Spirit Shield
WATCHER-SPIRIT_SHIELD.description: Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] for each card in your hand.
WATCHER-MASTER_REALITY.title: Master Reality
WATCHER-MASTER_REALITY.description: Whenever a card is created during combat, [gold]Upgrade[/gold] it.
WATCHER-WREATH_OF_FLAME.title: Wreath of Flames
WATCHER-WREATH_OF_FLAME.description: Your next Attack deals {VigorPower:diff()} additional damage.
WATCHER-OMEGA.title: Omega
WATCHER-OMEGA.description: At the end of your turn, deal {OmegaPower:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
WATCHER-BETA.title: Beta
WATCHER-BETA.description: Shuffle an [gold]Omega[/gold] into your draw pile.
WATCHER-ALPHA.title: Alpha
WATCHER-ALPHA.description: Shuffle a [gold]Beta[/gold] into your draw pile.
WATCHER-DEVA_FORM.title: Deva Form
WATCHER-DEVA_FORM.description: At the start of your turn, gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} and increase this gain by 1.
WATCHER-BECOME_ALMIGHTY.title: Become Almighty
WATCHER-FAME_AND_FORTUNE.title: Fame and Fortune
WATCHER-LIVE_FOREVER.title: Live Forever
WATCHER-ANCIENT_CARD.title: Discipline
WATCHER-ANCIENT_CARD.description: If you end your turn with unused {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}, draw that many additional cards next turn.
WATCHER-ANCIENT_CARD2.title: Combustion
WATCHER-WISH_WATCHER.title: Wish
